title: data.zeeker.sg
description: Open data platform for exploration, analysis, and programmatic access
about: Providing free access to structured data for research, analysis, and application development

sg-gov-newsrooms.title: SG Government Newsrooms
sg-gov-newsrooms.description: News and announcements from Singapore government ministries and the judiciary — press releases, speeches, parliamentary replies, and court announcements.

mlaw_news.title: Ministry of Law News
mlaw_news.description: Press releases, speeches, parliamentary speeches, and announcements from the Ministry of Law Singapore (2026 onwards). Full article text is stored but not displayed; use the AI-generated summary for search and reading.

columns.id: Unique identifier (SHA-256 hash of source URL)
columns.title: Title of the news item or speech
columns.category: Content type: press-releases, speeches, parliamentary-speeches, announcements
columns.source_url: URL to the original page on mlaw.gov.sg
columns.summary: AI-generated summary highlighting key policy and legal points (~100 words)
columns.content_text: Full extracted article text (hidden — query directly via SQL)
columns.created_at: Timestamp when this record was first imported

judiciary_news.title: Singapore Judiciary News
judiciary_news.description: Media releases, judgments, and announcements from the Singapore Courts (Supreme Court, State Courts, Family Justice Courts). Covers significant rulings, practice directions, and court administration updates.

columns.id: Unique identifier (SHA-256 hash of source URL)
columns.title: Title of the media release, judgment, or announcement
columns.category: Content type from the judiciary RSS feed
columns.source_url: URL to the original page on judiciary.gov.sg
columns.summary: AI-generated summary of the judicial announcement or ruling (~100 words)
columns.content_text: Full extracted text (hidden — query directly via SQL)
columns.created_at: Timestamp when this record was first imported
